scripts.start: npm run edge:login && docker compose up -d db && docker compose -p plainid-edge -f edge/docker-compose/docker-compose.yaml up -d --remove-orphans --force-recreate --pull=always
scripts.start:with-logs: npm run edge:login && docker compose up -d db && docker compose -p plainid-edge -f edge/docker-compose/docker-compose.yaml up -d --remove-orphans --force-recreate --pull=always && docker compose -p plainid-edge -f edge/docker-compose/docker-compose.yaml logs -f
scripts.stop: docker compose down && docker compose -p plainid-edge -f edge/docker-compose/docker-compose.yaml down --remove-orphans --timeout 5
scripts.dev: npm run edge:login && docker compose up -d db && docker compose -p plainid-edge -f edge/docker-compose/docker-compose.yaml up -d --remove-orphans --force-recreate --pull=always && concurrently -n backend,frontend,edge -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:edge:logs"
scripts.dev:edge: npm run edge:login && docker compose -p plainid-edge -f edge/docker-compose/docker-compose.yaml up -d --remove-orphans --force-recreate --pull=always
scripts.edge:login: set -a; . ./backend/.env; : "${PLAINID_DOCKER_REGISTRY_HOST?Missing PLAINID_DOCKER_REGISTRY_HOST}"; : "${PLAINID_DOCKER_REGISTRY_USERNAME?Missing PLAINID_DOCKER_REGISTRY_USERNAME}"; : "${PLAINID_DOCKER_REGISTRY_PASSWORD?Missing PLAINID_DOCKER_REGISTRY_PASSWORD}"; printf '%s' "$PLAINID_DOCKER_REGISTRY_PASSWORD" | docker login "$PLAINID_DOCKER_REGISTRY_HOST" -u "$PLAINID_DOCKER_REGISTRY_USERNAME" --password-stdin
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
